steps.title: Calculate total propellant burned
steps.content:
The rocket started with 467,000 kg and had 362,105 kg remaining after 21 seconds. The total amount burned is:
$$467,000 - 362,105 = 104,895 \text{ kg}$$

steps.title: Divide by time to find average burn rate
steps.content:
Average burn rate per second is:
$$\frac{104,895}{21} = 4,995 \text{ kg/second}$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
